auth.label: API Key
auth.description: SureContact API key sent with the X-API-Key header. Create or view it from the SureContact API settings area documented at https://api.surecontact.com/docs.

actions.name: add_contacts_to_list
actions.description: Add one or more SureContact contacts to a list.

contactUuids.description: SureContact contact UUIDs to add or remove.

inputSchema.description: Input for changing list contact membership.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: attach_contact_lists
actions.description: Attach one or more SureContact lists to a contact.

inputSchema.description: Input for attaching SureContact resources.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: attach_contact_tags
actions.description: Attach one or more SureContact tags to a contact.

inputSchema.description: Input for attaching SureContact resources.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: create_contact
actions.description: Create a SureContact contact and optionally attach lists or tags.

customFields.description: Custom contact fields keyed by SureContact field identifier.

listUuids.description: SureContact list UUIDs to attach to the contact.

tagUuids.description: SureContact tag UUIDs to attach to the contact.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a SureContact contact.

actions.name: create_list
actions.description: Create a SureContact list.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a SureContact list.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts in the list.

actions.name: create_tag
actions.description: Create a SureContact tag.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating a SureContact tag.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts assigned to the tag.

actions.name: delete_contact
actions.description: Delete a SureContact contact by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a SureContact contact.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: delete_list
actions.description: Delete a SureContact list by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a SureContact list.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: delete_tag
actions.description: Delete a SureContact tag by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for deleting a SureContact tag.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: detach_contact_lists
actions.description: Detach one or more SureContact lists from a contact.

inputSchema.description: Input for attaching SureContact resources.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: detach_contact_tags
actions.description: Detach one or more SureContact tags from a contact.

inputSchema.description: Input for attaching SureContact resources.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: get_contact
actions.description: Retrieve one SureContact contact by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a SureContact contact.

actions.name: get_contact_by_email
actions.description: Retrieve one SureContact contact by email address.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a SureContact contact by email.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Retrieve one SureContact list by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a SureContact list.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts in the list.

actions.name: get_tag
actions.description: Retrieve one SureContact tag by UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for retrieving a SureContact tag.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts assigned to the tag.

actions.name: list_contacts
actions.description: List SureContact contacts with optional search, status, list, tag, and pagination filters.

page.description: Page number to request from SureContact.

perPage.description: Number of records to request per page.

search.description: Search term used to filter contacts.

listUuid.description: Return contacts attached to this SureContact list UUID.

tagUuid.description: Return contacts attached to this SureContact tag UUID.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing SureContact contacts.

current_page.description: Current page number returned by SureContact.

per_page.description: Number of records per page returned by SureContact.

total.description: Total record count returned by SureContact.

last_page.description: Last page number returned by SureContact.

actions.name: list_lists
actions.description: List SureContact lists with optional search and pagination filters.

page.description: Page number to request from SureContact.

perPage.description: Number of records to request per page.

search.description: Search term used to filter resources.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing SureContact resources.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts in the list.

current_page.description: Current page number returned by SureContact.

per_page.description: Number of records per page returned by SureContact.

total.description: Total record count returned by SureContact.

last_page.description: Last page number returned by SureContact.

actions.name: list_tags
actions.description: List SureContact tags with optional search and pagination filters.

page.description: Page number to request from SureContact.

perPage.description: Number of records to request per page.

search.description: Search term used to filter resources.

inputSchema.description: Input for listing SureContact resources.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts assigned to the tag.

current_page.description: Current page number returned by SureContact.

per_page.description: Number of records per page returned by SureContact.

total.description: Total record count returned by SureContact.

last_page.description: Last page number returned by SureContact.

actions.name: remove_contacts_from_list
actions.description: Remove one or more SureContact contacts from a list.

contactUuids.description: SureContact contact UUIDs to add or remove.

inputSchema.description: Input for changing list contact membership.

success.description: Whether SureContact reported the operation as successful.

actions.name: update_contact
actions.description: Update a SureContact contact by UUID.

contactUuid.description: The SureContact contact UUID to update.

customFields.description: Custom contact fields keyed by SureContact field identifier.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a SureContact contact.

actions.name: update_list
actions.description: Update a SureContact list by UUID.

listUuid.description: The SureContact list UUID to update.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a SureContact list.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts in the list.

actions.name: update_tag
actions.description: Update a SureContact tag by UUID.

tagUuid.description: The SureContact tag UUID to update.

inputSchema.description: Input for updating a SureContact tag.

anyOf.description: Number of contacts assigned to the tag.

actions.name: upsert_contact
actions.description: Create or update a SureContact contact by email address.

customFields.description: Custom contact fields keyed by SureContact field identifier.

listUuids.description: SureContact list UUIDs to attach to the contact.

tagUuids.description: SureContact tag UUIDs to attach to the contact.

inputSchema.description: Input for creating or updating a SureContact contact by email.
